title: The Months I Didn't Notice Her Leaving
theme: Heartbreak begins quietly before he sees it.
sceneDescription: Chapter 25 is presented as a privacy-safe stylized memoir scene using rain-softened window light, empty road, fading leaves. The Living Scene Layer supports the memory without changing the manuscript text or recreating real people photorealistically.
privacyNotes: Use privacy-safe, stylized, non-photorealistic character presence. Do not create final faces unless explicitly approved.
